name: Dak's Coconut-Pineapple Wheat Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Crushed pineapple, packed in its own juice, drained
3 tablespoons Pineapple juice (liquid drained from can)
1/2 cup Shredded coconut (optional, add at start of second mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
2. Select 'whole wheat' setting and press 'start'.
